summary: Final-component symlink swaps are blocked, but a material ancestor-directory TOCTOU symlink escape still remains on both read and write paths.

findings.title: Ancestor path components can still be swapped to symlinks after validation and before use
findings.recommendation: Re-open or traverse the path via directory file descriptors, validating each component with no-symlink semantics from `ROOT` downward, and perform reads/writes relative to those handles. As written, `assertRealInRoot`/`assertWriteInRoot` validate the path first, but `open(abs, O_NOFOLLOW)` only protects the final component and `mkdir`/`writeFile`/`rename` still follow symlinks in ancestor directories if one is swapped in after the check.
